chapter_title.en: The Reward of Helping a Believer, Relieving Him of Distress And Showing Him Kindness

text: عن مسمع قال: سمعت الصادق عليه السلام يقول: من نفس عن مؤمن كربة من كرب الدنيا، نفس الله عنه كربة من كرب الآخرة، وخرج من قبره [وهو] ثلج الفؤاد.

en.muhajir-b-ali: 115.It has been related that Musmi’ said:I heard al-Sadiq (a.s) saying: Whoever relieves a believer of a worldly anxiety, Allah will dispel from him a distress of the hereafter and he will come forth from his grave whilst he is delighted.”
